Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

C

canFlee() - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.EncounterSystem
Determines whether a flee attempt is successful.
checkForEncounter() - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.EncounterSystem
Determines whether a random enemy encounter is triggered.
Consumable - Klasse in model.items
Represents a consumable item that can be used to apply an effect to an entity.
Consumable(String, String, String, Itemtype, Effect) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.items.Consumable
Creates a new consumable item with the specified properties and effect.
CONSUMABLES - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.Itemtype
Items that can be consumed to produce an effect (e.g., healing, buffs).
ConsumableSelectionJDialog - Klasse in view.battle
The ConsumableSelectionJDialog provides a popup dialog that allows the player to select a consumable item during battle.
contains(Item) - Methode in Klasse model.items.Inventory
Checks whether the inventory contains a specific item.
controller - Package controller
 
createNewGame() - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.GameController
Creates and initializes a new Game.
createNewPlayer(String, String, Game) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Creates a new player with default attributes and starter items.
CreateNewSavePanel - Klasse in view
A panel used for creating a new game save.
CreateNewSavePanel(GameFrame, Game) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.CreateNewSavePanel
Creates a new character creation panel.
